description: Skill target board: answers with the current date and time as a speakable sentence, e.g. { "text": "Today it's Friday, July, 17. 2026 21:13" }. Used by the Voice Assistant + Skills board — the skill-router dispatches here, and the outer board's text-to-speech turns the returned text into audio. Save this board locally as 'current time' so the dispatcher can find it by name.

template.text=: "Today it's " + formatNow('dddd, MMMM, D. YYYY HH:mm')
